caption: A presentation slide on a teal background introduces Pilar García Freire, identified as the "Jefa de Unidad de Recursos Educativos Digitales." A small, square portrait photo of a woman with blonde hair is positioned in the center of the screen. The slide's text addresses teachers, stating, "Si eres docente y estás interesado en los Recursos Educativos Abiertos, qué son, cómo crearlos, dónde encontrarlos y cómo usarlos..." and concludes with the invitation, "No te pierdas esta EDUcharla." Across the sequence of frames, the image remains static, though the framing shifts slightly. In the final frame, additional smaller text appears at the bottom right, instructing viewers to "Suscríbete al canal de youTube del INTEF, donde encontrarás el resto de EDUcharlas realizadas." The overall layout is clean and professional, using a white rectangular overlay for the top section and teal for the rest.
